detailedDescription: The Crucial P3 Plus 256GB NVMe SSD delivers blazing-fast performance with PCIe 4.0 interface. With read speeds up to 3500MB/s and write speeds up to 2800MB/s, this M.2 2280 drive is perfect for gaming, content creation, and professional workloads. Features advanced heat dissipation and intelligent thermal throttling protection.
additionalSpecs: 256GB Capacity | PCIe 4.0 | M.2 2280 | Up to 3500MB/s Read | Up to 2800MB/s Write | 1.5M Hours MTBF | AES 256-bit Encryption | Dynamic Thermal Guard
